company_name: Holly Days Nursery, Garden Center, & Landscaping
tagline: Award-Winning Landscaping, Garden Center, & Aquatics Since 1994

hero.headline:
Your Dream Landscape, Rooted in
31 Years of Expertise
hero.subheadline: From stunning landscape designs to the largest aquatic center in the region, Holly Days has been transforming outdoor spaces across Montgomery County since 1994. One team for your nursery, landscaping, and pond needs.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Everything for Your Outdoor<br class="hidden md:block"> Space Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From the first sketch to the final planting, Holly Days handles every detail so you can enjoy a landscape that turns heads and lasts for decades.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Installation
cards.description: Work with our award-winning designers to create a custom plan for your property. From plantings and grading to full outdoor transformations, we bring your vision to life.

cards.title: Hardscaping & Construction
cards.description: Patios, retaining walls, walkways, driveways, and steps built to last. We craft outdoor living foundations that are as durable as they are beautiful.

cards.title: Pond & Aquatics Services
cards.description: The largest aquatic center in the region. Koi pond construction, waterfalls, fountains, pond maintenance, and a fully stocked aquatics supply department.

cards.title: Outdoor Living Spaces
cards.description: Outdoor kitchens, fireplaces, fire pits, pergolas, and decks designed to extend your living space into the fresh air year-round.

cards.title: Nursery & Garden Center
cards.description: The region's largest selection of perennials, trees, shrubs, annuals, and gardening supplies. Expert staff to help you pick exactly what thrives in your yard.

cards.title: Landscape Lighting & Materials
cards.description: Professional lighting design to showcase your property after dark, plus bulk delivery of topsoil, mulch, stone, and other landscape essentials.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Perfect Outdoor Space

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your property and vision. Our designers will visit, listen, and provide an honest, no-pressure proposal tailored to your space and budget.

steps.title: We Design & Build
steps.description: Our 19-person team handles every detail from design through construction. We keep you informed at every stage and ensure the finished result matches your vision exactly.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Outdoor Oasis
steps.description: Step into a landscape you love coming home to. From lush gardens to tranquil ponds, your outdoor space becomes the best room in your home.

about.label: Why Homeowners Trust Holly Days
about.headline: Not Just a Nursery — Your Complete Outdoor Partner
about.description: Family-owned and serving Montgomery County since 1994, Holly Days is led by President Torrey Rose and a passionate 19-person team. Voted Top 5 Landscapers in Philadelphia by CBS Philly and winner of 8 Best of Houzz awards, we combine horticultural expertise with environmentally-sound practices to deliver landscapes that stand the test of time.

features.title: Award-Winning Design Team
features.description: Recognized by CBS Philly, Houzz, and Montgomery County for design excellence. Our team brings decades of horticultural knowledge to every project.

features.title: Full-Service, One Team
features.description: Nursery, garden center, landscaping, hardscaping, and aquatics all under one roof. No subcontractors, no finger-pointing, no surprises.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Our A+ BBB rating since 2008 speaks for itself. We stand behind every project and every plant we sell. Your happiness is our reputation.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is unique. We provide detailed proposals so you know exactly what you're investing in — no hidden fees, no change-order surprises.

guarantee.headline: Our "Landscape for Life" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any aspect of our work, we'll come back and make it right at no additional cost. We've built our reputation on standing behind every project for over 31 years, and we're not about to stop now.

faqs.question: How soon can you start my landscaping project?
faqs.answer: Most new projects are scheduled within 1-2 weeks depending on scope and season. For consultations, we can usually visit your property within a few days. Call us and we'll find a time that works for you.

faqs.question: Do you offer pond maintenance services?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our Aquatics department, led by specialists with decades of experience, provides full pond cleaning, maintenance, and seasonal services. We've been maintaining ponds across the region for over 30 years.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Ambler, Horsham, Lansdale, North Wales, Willow Grove, Blue Bell, Valley Forge, Philadelphia, and surrounding communities throughout Montgomery County and Bucks County, PA.

faqs.question: Can I visit your nursery and garden center?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our retail nursery in Ambler is open to the public and features the largest selection of perennials and trees in the region. Our knowledgeable staff is always happy to help you pick the right plants for your property.

faqs.question: Do you handle both design and construction?
faqs.answer: Yes, we are a full design-build firm. Our team handles everything from the initial design concept through construction and final planting. One team, one vision, one point of accountability from start to finish.

testimonials.name: Paul's Client
testimonials.text: The team from Holly Days did an amazing job ensuring every aspect of our plan was carried out carefully and efficiently. Paul's management of the project ensured we were completely satisfied. He continually checked in with us to make sure our project was just what we had envisioned.

testimonials.name: Pond Customer
testimonials.text: We've used Holly Days to clean and maintain our backyard pond for over a decade. The level of professionalism, knowledge, and service from the Aquatics department is outstanding. Chuck is such a pleasure to work with.

testimonials.name: Blue Bell Homeowner
testimonials.text: John designed a gorgeous backyard and his team did an amazing job implementing his plan. My landscape took the giant leap from 'meh' to 'amazing!' I highly recommend their services to anyone looking to transform their outdoor space.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform Your
Outdoor Space?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure design consultation. Visit our nursery in Ambler or call us today — we'll help you create the outdoor space you've always wanted.

footer.description: Award-winning landscaping, garden center, and aquatics serving Montgomery County since 1994.
